message:
test(raptorq): add Track-E p95/p99 schema validation and high-confidence linkage tests

Two new comprehensive test functions for Track-E benchmark artifacts:

e3_track_e_gf256_p95p99_artifact_schema_and_coverage:
- Validates schema version, track bead anchoring, source artifact linkage
- Verifies mode coverage (auto/baseline/rollback) and operation scope
  (the four canonical dual-slice operations)
- Checks percentile monotonicity (p50 <= p95 <= p99) for both time_us
  and throughput_gib_s across all mode/operation pairs
- Validates reproducibility via rch-offloaded benchmark commands

e3_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_contract_and_linkage:
- Validates high-confidence artifact points back to base p95/p99 artifact
- Enforces sampling contract (sample_size >= 30, criterion_settings)
- Verifies mode/operation coverage matches base artifact exactly
- Checks sample counts equal criterion sample_size for every entry
- Validates command trio (baseline/auto/rollback) with sample-size 60
- Ensures findings and limitations arrays are non-empty

Also adds E3_TRACK_E_GF256_P95P99_SCHEMA_VERSION and
E3_TRACK_E_GF256_P95P99_HIGHCONF_SCHEMA_VERSION constants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
